Thanks for contributing to terso-cli. Filling in this template helps us review
faster. Delete sections that don't apply.
-->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences. What does this PR do, and why? -->

## Change type

- [ ] Bug fix (no API change)
- [ ] New feature (backward-compatible)
- [ ] Breaking change (out-of-band; see RELEASE.md)
- [ ] Docs / chore / internal

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated (unless docs/chore).
- [ ] `npm test` passes locally.
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes locally.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `(unreleased)` for user-visible changes.
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or flags changed.
- [ ] No new runtime dependency without justification in the description.
